note: annual renewal: date, amount, review and cancel (cancel outside lexicon)

message.subject: Your annual plan renews soon
message.body_text: Your annual streaming plan renews on 07/14/2026 for $109.99. To make changes or cancel, review your subscription settings before the renewal date.

note: trial ending: end date and post-trial price are user-relevant; add outside lexicon

message.subject: Your trial ends soon
message.body_text: Your free trial ends on June 19, 2026. Add a payment method to keep your workspace. After the trial, the Team plan is $12.50 per user per month.

note: price increase: effective date and both prices, no action

message.subject: An update to your plan price
message.body_text: The price of your monthly plan will change from $15.49 to $17.99 starting with your billing period beginning August 9, 2026. No action is needed to continue.

note: storage upsell: marketing price is not an obligation (FP trap)

message.subject: Your storage is almost full
message.body_text: Your cloud storage is 95% full. Upgrade to get 2 TB for $9.99 per month. Your files will stop syncing once storage is full.

note: domain expiration with ISO date and renew action

message.subject: Domain expiring: example-portfolio.example
message.body_text: The domain example-portfolio.example is set to expire on 2026-08-22. Renew now for $14.99 per year to avoid losing the domain. Auto-renew is currently off.

note: gym annual fee: charge date plus relative cancellation lead time

message.subject: Annual fee notice
message.body_text: Your gym membership annual fee of $349 will be charged to the card on file on July 5, 2026. To freeze or cancel your membership, submit a request at least 5 business days before the billing date.

deadlines: at least 5 business days before the billing date

note: failed payment: amount plus relative 7-day window; update outside lexicon

message.subject: We couldn't process your payment
message.body_text: We could not process your payment of $11.99 for your music subscription. Update your payment method within 7 days to avoid interruption.

note: newsletter upgrade marketing: offer price and offer end date are marketing (FP traps)

message.subject: Unlock premium for less
message.body_text: You have been reading our free edition for 6 months. Upgrade to premium for $4 per month and unlock all articles. Offer ends June 30, 2026.

note: license renewal with attachment quote: body and attachment amounts differ in string form

message.subject: Team license renewal and quote
message.body_text: Your team's software license (12 seats) expires on 09/30/2026. Renew before the expiration date to keep your current per-seat rate of $89. A quote is attached.
attachment_texts: Quote Q-2026-1184: 12 seats x $89.00 = $1,068.00 annual. Valid until 08/15/2026.

message.subject: Too many devices streaming
message.body_text: Too many devices are streaming right now. Your plan allows 2 simultaneous streams. Manage devices in account settings.

note: cancellation confirmation: service end date is user-relevant, no obligation amount

message.subject: Your subscription is canceled
message.body_text: Your subscription has been canceled and will remain active until the end of the current period on July 8, 2026. You will not be charged again. We're sorry to see you go.

message.subject: Family plan renewal ahead
message.body_text: Heads-up: your password manager family plan renews Sep 12, 2026 at $59.88 per year. No action needed if you wish to continue.
